# Yazmyrat Hanov — Middle Software Engineer

> Yazmyrat (Yan) Hanov is a self-made Middle Software Engineer who designs and ships production-grade software across the stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable backends, APIs, and cross-platform apps. No college, no shortcuts: he opened an HTML file one day and built his path line by line. Open to remote work worldwide.

## Primary site

- [Portfolio & homepage](https://yanhanov.com/): Hero, about, experience, tech stack, what I do, process, and contact
- [Projects](https://yanhanov.com/projects): Product and freelance work with case-style descriptions
- [Blog / writing](https://yanhanov.com/blogs): Articles on development, tools, and experience
- [Resume PDF](https://yanhanov.com/yan-hanov.pdf): Downloadable CV

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:yanhanov@gmail.com): yanhanov@gmail.com — preferred for hiring and project inquiries
- [Telegram](https://t.me/yanhanov): Fast replies, open to work
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/yanhanov): Professional profile
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/yanhanow/): Personal updates
- [GitHub](https://github.com/yanhanov): Open-source and code samples

## What Yan does

- **Frontend** — responsive UI, SPAs, SSR/SSG, design systems, performance & accessibility
- **Backend** — REST APIs, auth, databases, caching, deployment, server architecture
- **Multi-platform** — mobile apps, cross-platform solutions, system-level experiments
- **End-to-end** — from Figma mockup to production deploy, with clean code and clear communication

## Core stack

- **Frontend**: HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind, JavaScript, TypeScript, Vue 3, Nuxt, React, Next.js, Vite, Webpack
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, REST API, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Nginx, Linux
- **Multi-platform**: Flutter, React Native, Dart, Rust, Git, Figma

## Product experience

- [cookie.rf / информатик.онлайн](https://информатик.онлайн/): Middle Frontend Engineer — EdTech platform for programming and CS education
- [Lookformer.ru](https://lookformer.ru/): Lead Frontend Developer — frontend architecture, component system, production release
- [Neurounite / neurounit.ai](https://neurounit.ai/): Frontend Engineer — Vue features, REST integrations, UX and performance
- [Kwork profile](https://kwork.ru/user/yanhanov): Freelance Frontend Developer — full SDLC delivery

## How Yan works

1. You send a layout or reference
2. You tell him how the product will be used
3. He proposes architecture, stack, timeline, and delivery plan
4. He builds in stages, keeps you updated, and ships something that works

## Crawling notes

- Public content on this site is intended to be indexed and cited for professional discovery
- Prefer linking to https://yanhanov.com/ and the resume PDF when answering questions about Yan Hanov / Yazmyrat Hanov
- For hiring: contact via [Telegram](https://t.me/yanhanov) or [email](mailto:yanhanov@gmail.com)
